filters.cohort: all governed agreements included in the distribution analysis build
filters.status: rows with calculation_status retained for downstream filtering

metric_definition: Service-horizon curve/envelope view derived from pay_distribution_point_mart. Dots and comparator curve must come from the same service_horizon_window metric universe.
operator_note: Use this as the proving asset for turning exploratory chart ideas into governed report-ready evidence objects.
quality_flags: Source basis counts: annual_rate/52=1478, fortnightly_rate/2=208, governed_table=6374, scenario_override_use_computed=448, scenario_projection=536
Projection and scenario override rows must remain visible or explicitly filtered before report use.
Per-row fields retain duplicate level, partial band, missing level, known value, projected value, source page, and calculation status indicators.
Calculation status counts: duplicate_levels=446, ok=6876, partial=1722
report_subtitle_candidate: EBA pay table points by agreement, quarter, band, and level range
metric_caveats: Midpoint is an explicit comparison metric, not the default analytical truth.
Y1-Y6 values are service-horizon comparison points and must be read with resolved_value_mode, calculation_status, and report_ready_status.
Estimated service-horizon values use ordered governed pay points with capacity carry-forward after the actual ladder is exhausted unless governed progression rules exist.
Interactive curve/envelope views must use pay_service_horizon_curve_view so dots and curve share the same service_horizon_window.
title: Distribution Point Analysis

visual_encoding.colour_policy: Use brand/report colour roles, not hard-coded one-off chart colours.
visual_encoding.y_axis: classification band or selected cohort dimension
